race.comment: Scratchings have hit this race with a couple of key chances coming out. STRIKE GOLD (1) started at $7.50 last time and ran below expectations, finishing ninth and beaten 4.5 lengths at Bendigo over 1400m. Happy to ignore some of his recent form and focus on his record on synthetic tracks which is outstanding. Bounces back. ROYAL FOX (5) resumes. He's got strong synthetic form and was in good form last campaign for the Tzaferis yard. He can be strong late at odds. GLISK (9) struggled second up in town but had won her maiden well fresh and is open to plenty of improvement. LIFE SENTENCE (4) has an outstanding record on synthetic tracks having never missed a place, including 4 wins from 7 goes here. He should take catching.
